author: acaprino
description: A composable, drag-and-drop homepage. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
name: Homepage Blocks

releases.author: acaprino
releases.description:
Compliance/maintenance release for the Obsidian community review platform: resolves the "Local Storage" scan finding.

## Fixed
- Voice dictation consent flag now persists via Obsidian's official `App.loadLocalStorage`/`App.saveLocalStorage` API instead of raw `window.localStorage`. The official API scopes keys by real vault ID automatically — strictly better than the previous vault-name suffix, which could collide between two vaults sharing a name. Consent stays per-device and per-vault by design: a synced `data.json` or a shared layout pointing at someone else's API endpoint never inherits it.
- `minAppVersion` raised from 1.7.2 to 1.8.7 (the `@since` version of the new API), hence the minor version bump.

## Notes
- The consent storage key changed, so existing voice-dictation users will see the one-time consent dialog once more on their next recording. Migrating the old key would have required keeping a raw `localStorage` read in the code, defeating the remediation.
- The "Vault Enumeration" scan finding is an informational capability disclosure, not a violation: `getMarkdownFiles()` powers the Recent files, Vault search, Quotes list, Random note, and Embedded note suggester features, with all enumeration lazy and feature-gated. No code change applicable.

Full gate: tsc clean, eslint clean, 156/156 tests passing, zero `localStorage`/`sessionStorage` references in the bundled `main.js`.

releases.author: acaprino
releases.description:
Compliance/maintenance release for the Obsidian community review platform: resolves the CSS lint findings (64 warnings reduced to 15, each survivor justified inline).

## Fixed
- Replaced all 11 `:has()` selectors with JS-toggled state classes (`hp-toolbar-open`, `hp-header-empty`, `hp-dragging`, `hp-block-<type>`) and `:focus-within` for the vault-search focus ring, avoiding the broad selector-invalidation cost of `:has()`.
- Removed 33 of 45 `!important` declarations via cascade/specificity analysis. The 12 that remain are individually justified in comments: GridStack inline-style overrides (top/left/width/height), the `prefers-reduced-motion` kill-switch, measurement utility classes, and the vendored GridStack CSS.
- Gallery width caps moved into custom properties (`--hp-grid-cap`, `--hp-masonry-cap`, `--hp-masonry-gap`). This ends the specificity war with the JS-set inline variables and fixes a real bug: the old `columns: 3 !important` cap could force MORE masonry columns than the user configured; the new `min()` clamp respects the setting.

## Notes
- CSS multicolumn stays for the masonry layout (3 residual lint notes): the "partial support" flag concerns `column-span`/balancing, which are not used; column flow plus `break-inside` work on every Obsidian platform without JS measurement.

No functional changes intended. Full gate: tsc clean, eslint clean, 156/156 tests passing.

releases.author: acaprino
releases.description:
Compliance/maintenance release for the Obsidian community review platform.

## Fixed
- Removed a forbidden `eslint-disable` of `obsidianmd/ui/sentence-case` in the Video embed block; the URL placeholder now uses the `{video-id}` template form, which the rule exempts by design.
- `versions.json` now maps 1.2.1 to `minAppVersion` 1.7.2 (1.2.0 had shipped against 1.5.0 while the code already required 1.7.2 APIs).

## Tooling
- Added `@eslint-community/eslint-plugin-eslint-comments` with the same directive restrictions the community review platform enforces (`require-description`, `no-restricted-disable`).
- Scoped typed obsidianmd lint rules off JSON files.

No functional changes. Full gate: tsc clean, eslint clean, 156/156 tests passing.

releases.author: acaprino
releases.description:
## Highlights

### Security
- **Voice API keys encrypted at rest** — AES-GCM-256 with a non-extractable device key stored in IndexedDB; plaintext keys migrate on the next save.
- **First-use consent modal** per provider (Whisper / Gemini) before any audio upload, remembered locally per device.
- **Mobile fallback** — the voice block disables itself on platforms missing `MediaRecorder` / `navigator.mediaDevices` with a clear message.
- **Import sanitizer** — layout imports now strip `apiKey` and unknown config fields; the confirm dialog shows a dropped-count so you can see what changed.
- **Video embed** no longer grants `clipboard-write` to the embedded player; lightbox ESC respects open modals and contenteditable fields.

### Reliability
- **Save-layout disk errors** surface as a Notice (was previously swallowed, which caused silent reverts on next launch).
- **Tag cache** invalidates on vault events — quotes and random-note blocks always see fresh results after renames or tag edits.
- **MediaRecorder race** fixed — rapid stop→start no longer corrupts the new recording with stale chunks.
- **Auto-height batch** is now exception-safe (`setStatic(true)` restored via `finally`).

### UX
- **Hover highlight** toggle subtly lifts blocks on mouseover and reveals the collapse chevron.
- **Block settings modal** split into tabs (Header · Body · Card · Content) for faster navigation.
- **README** now documents the voice-dictation data flow, endpoints, and revocation steps.

## Under the hood

- `GridLayout.ts` 1,671 → ~950 LOC. Extracted: `Scheduler`, `AutoHeightManager`, `ResponsiveColumnsManager`, `BlockSettingsModal`, `RemoveBlockConfirmModal`.
- `main.ts` 686 → 351 LOC. Extracted: `HomepageSettingTab`, `ConfirmPresetModal`, `validation` (with the `validateLayout`-is-idempotent contract).
- **vitest + happy-dom + fake-indexeddb** harness with **70 tests** covering validation round-trips, migration idempotence, crypto round-trips, import sanitization, tag cache, Scheduler, newId, dailySeed.
- esbuild strips `console.debug/log/info/trace` in production (retains `error/warn`).
- `@typescript-eslint/no-floating-promises` enforced; all ObsidianReviewBot ESLint rules passing.

## Compatibility

- `minAppVersion`: **1.5.0** (unchanged).
- Existing `data.json` files migrate in place. Plaintext API keys will be encrypted on the next save. **No manual action required.**

## Install

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from this release into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/homepage-blocks/`, then enable the plugin in Settings → Community plugins.

releases.author: acaprino
releases.description:
### What's New
- Greeting block: 50 language presets, custom salutations, emoji picker with 3 modes (auto/custom/random)
- Accent color: intensity slider (5-100%), sRGB color-mix (no hue shift), interactive control overrides
- Responsive: gallery/quotes/greeting/button-grid auto-adapt to narrow containers
- Gallery: auto-height on resize, deferred ResizeObserver, batched resize coalescing
- Lightbox: instance-scoped, keyboard isolation, swipe navigation
- Security: HtmlBlock defense-in-depth tag stripping, VideoEmbed origin guard
- 15 block types (added spacer)

releases.author: acaprino
releases.description: Initial release of Homepage Blocks — a dynamic, composable homepage with native blocks.
